title: Maesyprior
summary: Maesyprior is a Site of Special Scientific Interest in Carmarthen & Dinefwr,  Wales.  A system of glacial meltwater channels preserved at this site contains important geological evidence concerning the nature of late Pleistocene geomorphological processes in west Wales.
text: Maesyprior is a Site of Special Scientific Interest in Carmarthen & Dinefwr,  Wales.  A system of glacial meltwater channels preserved at this site contains important geological evidence concerning the nature of late Pleistocene geomorphological processes in west Wales.
